name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: archiuvium-plugin-creator
plugins.description: Kitchen-sink template plugin demonstrating every Claude Code plugin component type. Includes a skill that guides users through creating new plugins from scratch, with working examples of skills, commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers.

plugins.name: ripvec
plugins.description: Semantic code search — find code by meaning, understand architecture through PageRank dependency graphs. GPU-accelerated embedding on Metal (macOS) and CUDA (Linux). Includes 6 MCP tools, 3 skills, 2 commands, and a code exploration agent.

plugins.name: tracemeld
plugins.description: LLM-native performance profiling — import CPU profiles from any language (Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C/C++), find bottlenecks, detect waste patterns, and navigate to hot code via LSP. Includes 12 MCP tools, 6 language profiling skills, and a performance analysis agent.
